shared_attributes.design_principle: static background elements, minimal detail to keep focus on Echo

context.role: decorative water bowl, no gameplay function (water is always available)
context.screen_position: lower left (x=40, y=100), right of food bowl
context.usage_scenario: always visible, purely decorative to complete cage environment, no interaction

visual_specification.shape: simple bowl/dish shape, top-down view, smaller than food bowl

animation.description: static decorative element, always shows water (no empty state)

visual_specification.details: brown bowl (#AB5236) with light blue water (#29ADFF) inside, always full, no interaction or state changes

relationships.shared_with: shares brown color (#AB5236) with food bowl and perch
relationships.differences_from: purely decorative (no gameplay function), unlike interactive food bowl, always static (no state changes)
